post.title: Backend Platform Engineer
post.job_description: We are looking for a Backend Platform Engineer to build internal services and APIs for operational workflows. The role requires strong Python, FastAPI or similar frameworks, PostgreSQL, SQLAlchemy, Pydantic, tests, Docker, CI/CD, logging, and reliable service-layer design. Experience with data integrity, validation, migrations, and developer tooling is preferred.

core_skills.skills_list: Python 3, type hints, pytest, packaging, logging, CLI tools, debugging
FastAPI, REST APIs, service-layer design, request validation, error handling
FastAPI routing, dependencies, schemas, testing, service boundaries
Schema design, migrations, data integrity, SQL queries, relational modeling
SQLAlchemy ORM/Core, sessions, models, query composition, Alembic migrations
pytest, fixtures, route tests, integration tests, validation tests
Docker, Docker Compose, repeatable local environments
GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, automated checks, regression prevention

bullets.description: Designed service-layer APIs for internal workflows and external integrations.
Implemented Pydantic validation models for request parsing and structured application errors.
Built FastAPI-based customer tools with authentication, validation, and operational reporting.
Maintained PostgreSQL schema migrations for internal data products.
Improved data-integrity checks across ingestion, transformation, and reporting workflows.
Built SQLAlchemy-backed reporting queries for operational dashboards.
Added CI regression checks for backend services and integration utilities.
Containerized the local development stack with Docker for repeatable setup.

selected_projects.label: Operations API Platform
selected_projects.description: Internal FastAPI service layer for operational workflows, validation-heavy APIs, PostgreSQL persistence, and background task orchestration.

selected_projects.label: Internal Data Service
selected_projects.description: Backend data service using PostgreSQL, SQLAlchemy, migrations, integrity checks, reporting endpoints, and CI-backed tests.
